Part 1 · 我做了什麼（1／2）

半年來我試過 6 款 AI 工具，終於把銷售工作自動化

Over 6 months I tried 6 AI tools and finally automated my sales workflow
半年篩選結論：通用對話好用但不懂平台規則，Accio 平台強但回傳慢 Token 花費較高；QoderWork 是目前使用最順暢的
6-month verdict: General chatbots are handy but don't know platform rules; Accio is powerful but slow & costly; QoderWork is the smoothest to use
悟空
TRIED
阿里內部通用對話 AI

場景：日常問答、平台規則速查
問題：相對功能較少，且技能也比較少

Use: Daily Q&A, quick rule checks
Issue: Relatively fewer features and limited skills available
Accio Work
TRIED
Workflow 自動化平台

場景：跨系統流程串接
問題：要點數、需自費，且反應速度較慢

Use: Cross-system workflow automation
Issue: Requires credits (self-paid) and response speed is slow
ChatGPT
TRIED集團禁用
OpenAI 通用 AI 助手

場景：寫觸達文案草稿、翻譯、腦力激盪
問題：內容通用、不懂阿里國際站規則；無法接內部數據，報告產不出來

Use: Drafting outreach copy, translation, brainstorming
Issue: Generic output; doesn't know Alibaba.com rules; no internal data — can't produce reports
Gemini
TRIED集團禁用
Google 通用 AI 助手

場景：圖片辨識、Google Search 深度資訊
問題：雖可用 NotebookLM 但提示詞太多，不可複製性

Use: Image recognition, deep Google Search info
Issue: NotebookLM is usable but requires too many prompts; not reproducible
Cursor
TRIED集團禁用
AI Coding IDE

場景：寫自動化腳本、改報告模板
問題：是工程師的工具，強在寫程式而非「銷售做法打包」，沒現成的銷售場景

Use: Writing automation scripts, editing report templates
Issue: Built for engineers — great at coding, not at packaging sales workflows; no ready-made sales scenarios
FINAL PICK
QoderWork
ADOPTED
AGENTIC SKILL 平台

我用它做了什麼：用內建的「客戶經理助手」專家套件，直接跑行業報告、生成報價單；每次踩坑都記進筆記，下一份報告就更快

What I did: Used the built-in "Account Manager Assistant" expert kit to run industry reports and generate quotes; every pitfall logged makes the next report faster
半年篩選結論：通用對話好用但不懂平台規則，Accio 平台強但回傳慢 Token 也花費較高；QoderWork 是目前使用最順暢的
Half-year verdict: General AI is useful but doesn't know platform rules; Accio is powerful but slow & costly on tokens. QoderWork is the smoothest one so far.
Part 1 · 我做了什麼（2／2）

選定 QoderWork 之後，我把一線重複勞動逐個打包成做法

After choosing QoderWork, I packaged each repetitive task into a reusable skill
從行業分析、報價到旺鋪首頁演示，三個銷售場景全走完
Three scenarios, three skills — each one solves a real pain point in my daily work
做法 · 01
01

客戶行業分析報告自動化

12-Page Customer Industry Analysis Report

從行業關鍵詞一路做到 12 頁 A4 橫向報告：抓流量、買家國家、熱門品、同行分析、即時採購商機，多個維度一次到位可支援國際站台上產品全分類，不限產業、不限層級

From industry keywords to a 12-page A4 landscape report: traffic, buyer countries, trending products, peer analysis, live RFQ — supports all product categories on Alibaba.com, no industry or tier limits
做法 · 02
02

報價單一鍵生成

One-Click Three-Tier Quotation Generator

透過每月月初更新促銷方案，效期、客戶經理名字、雙簽名自動帶入；確保每次產出的報價單都正確無誤

Monthly promo plan updates at the start of each month; validity dates, AM name, and dual signatures auto-filled — ensuring every generated quote is error-free
做法 · 03
03

旺鋪首頁演示器

Store Homepage Mockup Builder

只要給公司名就能生成客戶未來在阿里國際站的真實首頁樣子，拜訪時當場打開，客戶當場有感覺

Just provide a company name to generate what their real Alibaba.com storefront will look like — open it on the spot during visits and clients instantly get the picture
Part 2 · 為什麼是 QoderWork

內建專家套件 ＝ 方法論 ＋ 數據串接

Built-in Expert Kit = Methodology + Data Integration
一個套件，兩種能力：既懂平台規則與銷售流程，又能直連內部系統取得即時數據
One expert kit, two capabilities: platform knowledge & sales methodology + real-time internal data access
方法論 · Methodology
📚 平台知識庫
規則、流程、術語即問即答
Rules, processes & terms — instant answers
⚖️ 合規諮詢
禁限售、各國認證快速查詢
Restricted items & certification lookup
📊 商家運營指導
星等、櫥窗、促銷活動輔導
Star rating, showcase & promo coaching
🔍 招商觸達
研究同行譜圖再精準開發
Research peer landscape, then target precisely
💰 方案報價
入駐方案、套餐對比、ROI 分析
Onboarding plans, package comparison & ROI
📋 跟進管理
拜訪紀錄、會議筆記、進度追蹤
Visit logs, meeting notes & progress tracking
數據串接 · Data & API
🔗 Sales Brain
即時拉取行業流量與買家分布
Real-time industry traffic & buyer distribution
🔗 CRM 系統
客戶業績、跟進紀錄一鍵調取
Client performance & follow-up records in one click
🔗 RFQ 採購需求
真實買家詢盤直接嵌入報告
Real buyer inquiries embedded directly in reports
🔗 統一認證登入
一次授權，所有內部工具通用
One-time auth, all internal tools accessible
🔗 線上報價表格
價格隨後台同步，無需手動更新
Prices sync from backend — no manual updates
🔗 做法互相串接
報告→數據→認證一句話跑完
Report → data → auth — one prompt runs it all
Part 2 · 選型對比

同樣是阿里體系工具，為什麼我選 QoderWork？

All are Alibaba ecosystem tools — so why did I choose QoderWork?
不是產品好壞，是「適用場景不同」——關鍵看有沒有為你這個角色做好的專家套件
It's not about good or bad — it's about fit. The key is whether it has expert kits built for your role

悟空

Wùkōng
通用對話式 AI
  • 沒有國際站專屬知識，只能講通用電商
    No Alibaba.com-specific knowledge; only generic e-commerce
  • 無內部數據接入，拉不到客戶業績
    No internal data access; can't pull client performance
  • 沒有平台規則庫、沒有標準流程
    No platform rule base; no standard workflows
  • 適合：一次性資料查詢
    Best for: one-off information lookup

Accio Work

Accio Work
Workflow 自動化平台
  • 點數有額度限制，跑大任務容易觸頂
    Credit limits; large tasks easily hit the cap
  • 生成速度慢，回傳等待時間長
    Slow generation; long wait for responses
  • 報告需要真實圖片，AI 生圖是虛構的
    Reports need real images; AI-generated ones are fabricated
  • 有風控機制，產出報告過程中容易被中斷停滯
    Risk control mechanisms frequently interrupt report generation
  • 適合：創意文案、不要求真實素材的場景
    Best for: creative copy; scenarios not requiring real assets
RECOMMENDED

QoderWork ＋ 客戶經理助手

QoderWork + Account Manager Assistant
Agentic Skill 平台
  • 內建 GGS 平台知識庫（限售／星等／套餐）
    Built-in GGS knowledge base (restrictions / star ratings / packages)
  • 直連內部客戶數據，隨時拉出業績與跟進紀錄
    Direct internal data connection; pull performance & follow-up records anytime
  • 即時抓得到平台的銷售數據與採購趨勢
    Real-time access to platform sales data & procurement trends
  • 一次登入全部內部工具，不用重複帳號密碼
    Single sign-on for all internal tools — no repeated logins
  • 做法之間可以互相串接（報告→客戶數據→認證）
    Skills chain together (report → client data → authentication)
  • 踩坑筆記系統，讓每一次交付都幫下一次省時間
    Pitfall notes system — every delivery saves time for the next one
  • 適合：把方法論封裝成可複用資產
    Best for: packaging methodologies into reusable assets
Part 2 · 我的結論
"
AI 可以創造無限可能，
但前提是自己要向 AI 表達清楚述求
AI can create infinite possibilities — but only if you clearly communicate what you need.
AI 是強大的「輔助工具」而非「大腦替身」
它能大幅提升處理數據與重複性工作的效率
AI is a powerful assistant, not a brain replacement — it dramatically boosts efficiency in data processing and repetitive tasks.
Part 3 · 產生了什麼影響

從「做簡報的客戶經理」變回「談生意的客戶經理」

From "the account manager who makes decks" back to "the account manager who does business"
量化亮點 · 質化價值 · 一線視角
Numbers tell the efficiency story; the real change is how clients see me
4×
效率提升
單份報告從 1~2 小時 → 15~30 分鐘
Per report: 1–2 hrs → 15–30 min
Efficiency gain
40+
行業類別
覆蓋國際站產品全分類，已跨多品類實戰驗證
Covers all Alibaba.com categories; battle-tested across multiple industries
Industry categories covered
10+
可複用做法
報告、報價、旺鋪首頁演示，整套打包好
Report, quote, storefront mockup — full suite packaged
Reusable skills packaged
0
版本混亂
報價單模板統一化後，格式錯誤歸零
Unified quote templates eliminated all format errors
Version conflicts eliminated

質化價值 · 我個人最有感的四件事

Qualitative value — the 4 things that matter most to me personally
  • 不用每天花時間製作簡報；省下來的時間，全部拿去「跟客戶談需求」
    No more daily deck-making; saved time goes entirely to client conversations
  • 數據確定性：透過專家套件，讓報告更有確定性
    Data certainty: expert kits make reports more reliable
  • 拜訪時打開客戶的「未來旺鋪首頁」，談單轉化率明顯提升
    Opening the "future storefront" during visits noticeably boosts conversion
  • 每做完一份報告，就是每累積記憶都在幫下一個客戶準備模板，越做越快
    Every completed report builds memory that speeds up the next — it just keeps getting faster
Part 4 · 踩過的坑（1／2）

真實踩坑 · 每一條都寫進筆記，讓下一次不再重犯

Real pitfalls — every one logged so the next time won't repeat the mistake
「問題 → 對策」左右對照 · 這是最重要的一章
Problem → Solution side by side — this is the most important chapter
01
Problem
資料抓不到、一直斷線
內部系統不穩定，報告跑到一半常斷線
Internal systems unstable; reports often disconnect midway
Solution
拆小批次逐張跑；關鍵數據先存一份到本機當離線備份
Break into small batches; save key data locally as offline backup
02
Problem
新報告裡殘留舊客戶的名字
複製舊報告改寫時，容易漏改客戶名稱
When copying old reports, easy to miss renaming the client
Solution
交件前用「尋找與取代」掃舊客戶名＋行業關鍵詞，雙重把關
Find & Replace old client names + industry keywords before delivery — double-check
03
Problem
產出的 PDF 排版常常跑掉
直接產 PDF 格式常亂，反覆重跑耗時
Direct PDF output often has broken layout; re-running wastes time
Solution
改產 HTML；需要 PDF 時用瀏覽器 Cmd+P 列印，格式穩定
Output HTML instead; use browser Cmd+P to print as PDF — stable formatting
04
Problem
印出來會多出莫名其妙的空白頁
A4 列印時頁數切割不準，中間夾雜空白頁
A4 print pagination inaccurate; blank pages appear in between
Solution
事先固定每頁高度，讓印表機自動分頁，問題根除
Fix page height in advance; let printer auto-paginate — problem eliminated
Part 4 · 踩過的坑（2／2）

技術之外的坑：合規紅線與報告不能帶推銷感

Beyond tech: compliance red lines & reports must not feel salesy
內部資料的限制 · RFQ 買家隱私 · 報告與報價嚴格分開
Internal data restrictions · RFQ buyer privacy · strict separation of reports and quotes
05
Problem
有些內部資料不能直接抓
後台需登入驗證，部分數據無法自動取得
Backend requires login; some data can't be auto-fetched
Solution
關鍵數據手動截圖留底；產出後人工校對一次再交付
Screenshot key data manually; proofread once before delivery
06
Problem
不能亂寫買家資訊
絕對不能編造買家名字、訂單數量或採購預算
Never fabricate buyer names, order quantities, or procurement budgets
Solution
只放公開可驗證的資訊：品類、規格趨勢、採購國；連結直接導向 RFQ 原始頁
Only use publicly verifiable info: categories, spec trends, buyer countries; link directly to RFQ source page
07
Problem
報告散落各處，找不到舊版
沒有統一歸檔，回頭找時到處翻
No unified filing; searching for old versions means looking everywhere
Solution
每位客戶一個資料夾，版本依日期排列，隨時可查
One folder per client; versions sorted by date — findable anytime
共同心法：資料源會斷、模板會漏改、合規有紅線——所以每次交件都要有備案、交付前再掃一次、報告歸報告，報價歸報價，三件事不混在一起
Core principle: Data sources break, templates get missed edits, compliance has red lines — so always have a backup plan, scan once before delivery, and keep reports and quotes strictly separate
Part 5 · 重點收獲

八條可帶走的方法論 · 給每一位客戶經理

8 takeaway methodologies — for every account manager
從工具選型、可複用做法、踩坑筆記，到品牌一致性與團隊共享
From tool selection to reusable skills, pitfall notes, brand consistency, and team sharing
01

AI 不是取代銷售 AI doesn't replace sales

是把銷售從「每天重複做的事」中解放，把時間拿去「談生意、談市場」

It frees salespeople from daily repetitive work — so they can focus on deals and markets
02

把做法包起來，才能重複用 Package to reuse

每一次做得好的流程，包成一個可重複用的「技能」，比每次都重新問 AI 有效率得多

Every successful workflow packaged into a reusable "skill" is far more efficient than asking AI from scratch each time
03

踩過的坑要寫下來 Write down pitfalls

把每次出錯的地方記在筆記裡，下一份報告就不會重犯，效率才會越做越快

Log every mistake in notes — the next report won't repeat it, and efficiency keeps improving
04

AI產出的內容，讓客戶一眼就吸睛 AI content catches clients' eyes instantly

專業的排版與數據呈現，讓客戶收到報告就覺得你很用心，信任感馬上拉高

Professional layout and data presentation make clients feel your dedication — trust builds instantly
05

技能是為了提升效率 Skills boost efficiency

做成一個可複製模式，要讓整個團隊都能使用

Build a replicable model that the entire team can use
06

資料抓不到時要有備案 Always have a backup

內部數據常常會斷，要準備好 B 計畫：先存一份在電腦上，抓不到時就拿備用

Internal data often breaks — have Plan B: save a copy locally; use the backup when needed
07

選對工具比努力用工具更重要 Right tool > hard work

選型要看「能不能讓我越做越輕鬆」，而不是看「功能有多強」

Choose tools based on "will it make my work easier over time" — not "how powerful is it"
08

懂你的工具 > 最強的通用 AI Role-aware AI > generic AI

一線最需要的不是「最強的 AI」，而是「懂我這個角色的 AI」

Frontline staff don't need the strongest AI — they need an AI that understands their role
Part 6 · 知識共享

我分享的三個技能：每個都附上實際呈現的樣子

Three skills I'm sharing — each with a real demo of what it produces
下面三張卡，就是我打算傳給全球隊友的資產 · 每張都附圖或影片讓人看清楚
The three cards below are the assets I'm sharing with the global team — each with images or videos
分享 · 01
01

12 頁客戶行業分析報告

12-Page Customer Industry Analysis Report

從行業關鍵詞一路跑到 12 頁 A4 橫向報告：抓流量、買家國家、熱門品、同行分析、即時採購商機，多個維度一次到位，支援國際站全部分類

From industry keywords to a 12-page A4 landscape report: traffic, buyer countries, trending products, peer analysis, and live RFQ — all dimensions covered, supporting every category on Alibaba.com

提示詞：公司名稱：XXX公司　主營類目：XXX 或 主營產品：XXX

Prompt: Company Name: XXX Co.　Main Category: XXX or Main Product: XXX
分享 · 02
02

報價單一鍵生成

One-Click Quotation Generator

一次產出報價單，客戶公司名、客戶經理名字、雙簽名自動帶入；價格與促銷隨時從線上表格更新，格式錯誤從此歸零

Generate a quote in one click — company name, account manager name, and dual signatures auto-filled; pricing & promotions sync from an online spreadsheet in real time, eliminating format errors

提示詞：公司名稱：XXX公司　方案：1G1P+OKKI+AI Reach

Prompt: Company Name: XXX Co.　Package: 1G1P+OKKI+AI Reach

（會根據不同方案，也會帶入不同促銷，比如：星級直達或是保效商機）

Different packages auto-load different promotions, e.g. Star Direct or Guaranteed Leads
分享 · 03
03

旺鋪首頁演示器

Store Homepage Mockup Builder

只要給公司名就能生成、或自動抓官網圖、或全客製產出客戶未來在阿里國際站的真實首頁樣子，拜訪時當場打開客戶就有畫面

Just provide a company name to generate — auto-grabs images from their website or fully customizes — produces what their real Alibaba.com storefront will look like; open it on the spot during visits so clients can visualize instantly

提示詞：公司名稱：XXXXX .LTD　主營產品：XXX

Prompt: Company Name: XXXXX .LTD　Main Product: XXX
